examples.title: SRL Inference Algorithm
examples.description: Basic pipeline approach for semantic role labeling
examples.code:
ALGORITHM SRL_Pipeline
BEGIN
  1. Parse sentence to get syntactic structure
  2. Identify predicates using verb lexicon
  3. For each predicate:
    a. Extract candidate arguments
    b. Compute features for each argument
    c. Classify role using ML model
  4. Resolve overlapping arguments
END
examples.explanation: Traditional feature-based pipeline separating parsing, predicate ID, and argument classification
